title: Harder Dried Ghast Recipe
description: A mod/datapack that replaces the Bone Block in the Dried Ghast recipe with a Nether Star
body:
**What does it do?**
This lightweight Mod/Datapack overrides the Dried Ghast's Recipe to include a Nether Star in place of a Bone Block.

**Pack Permissions**
You have FULL permission to reupload this Mod/Datapack anywhere you want, and you do not need to give credit... though it would be appreciated! :D
